title: croton nudulus
intro: Croton nudulus, also known as the Croton leucantha or Mexican firebush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Croton nudulus typically involve infusions or decoctions, and it is often used in folk remedies in Mexico and other parts of Central America.
